name: configloader
description: A standard-library-only typed config loader. Load(map[string]string) (Config, error) reads typed fields (Host, Port, Debug, Timeout, MaxConns) from a string map (env-var style), applies documented defaults for missing keys, validates ranges, and wraps the sentinel ErrInvalidConfig (testable via errors.Is) on any malformed or out-of-range input. A generic parseField[T] helper plus per-type parsers keep Load free of repetitive lookup/parse plumbing. Verified: gofmt-clean, go build/vet/test all green.

maintain.request: Add a LogLevel field to Config that is read from the LOG_LEVEL key and must be one of debug/info/warn/error (defaulting to "info" when absent); reject unknown or empty levels by wrapping ErrInvalidConfig. Also add a Config.Addr() string method that returns the host:port listen address using net.JoinHostPort so it is correct for IPv6 hosts.

review.bug: In Config.validate the port upper-bound check uses `c.Port > 65536` instead of `c.Port > 65535`, so the invalid port 65536 (one past the maximum 16-bit TCP port) wrongly passes validation.
